title: Create: Rustic Industry
description: This modpack is based on the Create mod and includes some really nice mods.
body:
This modpack is built around the Create mod and focuses on a realistic and immersive gameplay experience.
It encourages creativity, automation, and engineering — without breaking the natural feel of Minecraft.

Explore a world where every machine, system, and resource feels grounded and believable.
No overpowered tech, no magic shortcuts — just pure, hands-on mechanics powered by gears, shafts, and ingenuity.

🌿 Features

⚙️ Based on the Create mod and its add-ons

🌍 A semi-realistic world with balanced progression

🧱 Focus on engineering, automation, and creativity

🌄 Hand-picked mods to enhance realism and atmosphere

🎵 Smooth performance and a cohesive gameplay experience

Whether you’re building a fully automated factory or crafting detailed steampunk builds, this pack lets you engineer your own world — the realistic way.
